message:
chore(beads): sync issue store + last-touched from concurrent agents

Three-line issues.jsonl tick and a last-touched pointer update arriving
from other agents in the swarm during this commit pass. Rolling them
in to clear the working tree before push.

last-touched now points at coding_agent_session_search-0x5gm (the
active issue another agent is on). issues.jsonl changes are routine
status/updated_at ticks.
